untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'candle within third of yearly low' - no yearly_low indicator available; (2) 'opening gap confirmation' - no gap detection indicator available; (3) 'measure rule price target from Table 16.3' - requires external table lookup; (4) stop placement unspecified by author; (5) specific success rates and performance statistics (bull/bear rates, decline %, failure rate) are AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be quantified without external references.
translation_notes: Translated core translatable conditions: SHORT direction (bearish/black candle context), price below SMA50 (breakout below 50-day MA), small body_pct (short candle), tall shadows (upper_wick > lower_wick), and volume confirmation. Exit when price returns above SMA50. Critical context-dependent factors (yearly low positioning, gap confirmation, measure rule targets, stop loss) cannot be operationalized without additional data sources or external table references.
